title: ML10X Controller (global settings)
description: Device-wide settings that aren't per-preset: MIDI channel, device ID, connector names, per-loop include-in-trails toggles, input split and loop bypass persistent flags. One of these per ML10X.

uuid.description: Read-only device serial reported on connect. Editing this in the YAML has no effect.

midi_channel.description: MIDI channel the device listens on. 0 means 'ignore MIDI in'.

input_split.description: When true, Input Tip and Input Ring are routed independently instead of summed.

loop_bypass_persistent.description: When true, loop bypass state persists across preset changes for any loop not explicitly set by the new preset.

include_in_trails.description: Per-loop 'Enable Spillover' flag from Controller Settings. Only the 10 loops have these toggles in the editor UI — the 4 fixed endpoints (Input Tip/Ring, Output Tip/Ring) have no toggle.

connectors.description: Names for each of the 14 connectors. The 'name' (long, up to 16 chars) is what's shown most places; 'short_name' (up to 4) is for compact displays; 'input_name' / 'output_name' (up to 16 each) label the connector when it's the input or output of a chain.
